description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, blued steel barrel. The stock features a smooth, polished wood grain with a slight curve at the butt for shoulder support, and a metal buttplate is visible. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, with a bolt handle protruding from the right side, indicating manual cycling. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the barrel, with a front post and a rear notch for aiming. The rifle has an internal magazine, with no detachable box or drum visible, and a trigger guard enclosing the trigger beneath the receiver. The overall design is reminiscent of early to mid-20th-century military rifles, such as the Mauser or Mosin-Nagant, and is suitable for use in urban or historical settings.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a polished wooden stock, long blued steel barrel, and iron sights. The design is robust and traditional, featuring a bolt handle and internal magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, bolt handle, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile, barrel alignment, and sight placement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, trigger guard, and barrel details.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the undercarriage, trigger guard, and magazine area.
